description: Nousa discusses the future of social media, emphasizing its potential to enhance human capabilities rather than detract from them. He introduces 'or,' a decentralized platform focused on sound, aiming to improve attention spans and emotional engagement [t=1:12 - t=360:22].
topic_summary: The talk explores the negative impacts of current social media on mental health and creativity, proposing a new model that leverages sound to foster deeper connections and imagination [t=21:36 - t=221:23].
